rationale: The prior attempt tried to prove full Container =~= at c_ptr == container_ptr, which is unprovable because can_have_children is not in the ensures; it also lacked the intermediate transitivity assertions through pre_self_ that the auto-chosen triggers on the ensures-foralls need to fire. The repair restricts the container assert-forall to c_ptr != container_ptr (matching the ensures), adds explicit per-key transitivity assertions through pre_self_ inside each by-body so triggers line up, and emits the per-field equalities at container_ptr (including the quota that goes through spec_set_mem_4k(new_quota)) as flat asserts so the determinism predicate's conjunction can be discharged piece by piece.
